Lectures.pageLead: Talks, workshops and training on SAP BTP, integration and AI – hands-on and up to date.
Lectures.cvLead: Curriculum Vitae in English – full document (PDF) with education, experience and certifications.
Lectures.currentLead: Right now my main fixed curriculum is the programme below – complemented by talks, workshops and tailored training on the topics further down.
Lectures.topicsTitle: Focus areas: talks, workshops & custom training
Lectures.topicsLead: I offer these topics as a talk, workshop or bespoke training – scope, audience and dates are agreed with you.
Lectures.platformTitle: SAP BTP Solution Architect – training on my own learning platform
Lectures.platformText: I offer the SAP BTP Solution Architect training on my own privacy-compliant learning platform. All content and participant data are processed in line with GDPR – ideal for organisations with high data protection requirements.
Lectures.customFormats: Custom formats and topics on request.
Lectures.course1Desc: Comprehensive training for the SAP BTP Solution Architect role: architecture concepts, ISA-M, development and operations on SAP Business Technology Platform.
Lectures.course1Format: Online on my learning platform or live training
Lectures.lecture1Desc: Fundamentals of SAP Business Technology Platform: services, development environments and typical use cases.
Lectures.lecture2Desc: Practical overview of integration architectures, CI/CD for integration artefacts and best practices.
Lectures.lecture3Desc: Introduction to the autonomous enterprise with SAP – from the Business AI Platform, Joule and Knowledge Graph to governance and legal safeguarding. Selectable focus areas: platform & architecture, new key roles (Intent Architect, Agent Supervisor, Semantic Engineer, Governance Officer), organisational change, or practical ERP examples. Available as a talk, workshop or tailored training.

Curriculum.pdfEmbedFallback: Embedded PDF preview is not supported or blocked in your browser.
Curriculum.pdfEmbedHint: Open the CV in a new tab or download the file (links at the top).

Blog.pageLead: Stay informed on our blog and news platform.
Blog.articleFallback: This article is not available in your selected language. The version below is in {lang}.
Blog.indexSeriesSapAiLead: Seven related articles on roles, architecture, and diagrams around the SAP Business AI Platform.
Blog.indexSeriesRealPessimismTitle: Optimistic Real Pessimism · A manifesto for AI engineering
Blog.indexSeriesRealPessimismLead: Seven articles for everyone who wants to build AI automation for real — beyond demo hype and omnipotence fantasies. Five pillars, one manifesto, grounded in practice.
Blog.sapBusinessAiDisclaimerBody: The following analyses and role profiles reflect solely my personal, independent assessment as a former SAP specialist. They are based on SAP’s currently published strategic roadmaps and technology announcements around the SAP Business AI Platform. They represent a forward-looking interpretation of technological evolution in the ERP ecosystem and are not official guidance or job descriptions from SAP SE or partner companies.
Blog.sapBusinessAiDisclaimerFooter: The views, analyses, and assessments in this article are solely the personal opinions of Peter Alexander as an independent former SAP specialist. They do not constitute legal, tax, or investment advice and do not create an advisory relationship. This content does not represent the official position of SAP SE, partner companies, or other organisations mentioned – brand names are used for identification only. No warranty is made as to completeness or accuracy; liability is excluded to the extent permitted by law. Parts of this text may have been created with AI systems and editorially reviewed (transparency notice under the EU AI Act). © 2026 Peter Alexander / Next Chapter Experts · Legal notice: nextchapterexperts.com
Blog.realPessimismDisclaimerBody: The following articles reflect my personal, independent assessment as a practitioner in AI automation and software architecture. They are intended as field notes and food for thought — not as binding endorsements of specific vendors or products.
Blog.realPessimismDisclaimerFooter: The views expressed in this article are solely the personal opinions of Peter Alexander as an independent practitioner. They do not constitute legal, tax, or investment advice; reading this article does not create an advisory relationship. This content does not represent the official position of SAP SE, partner companies, or any other organisation mentioned – names are used for identification purposes only. No warranty is made as to completeness or accuracy; liability is excluded to the extent permitted by law. Parts of this text may have been created with AI systems and editorially reviewed (transparency notice under the EU AI Act). © 2026 Peter Alexander / Next Chapter Experts · Legal notice: nextchapterexperts.com

Portfolio.pageLead: Learn from experts: knowledge transfer & prototyping for SAP BTP, integration & AI – tailored, hands-on and flexible.
Portfolio.btp1Desc: Learn the fundamentals and advanced concepts of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) with hands-on examples.
Portfolio.btp2Desc: We help you gain the knowledge to deliver your SAP BTP projects successfully – tailored to your needs.
Portfolio.btp3Desc: We help you build prototypes for SAP BTP solutions and integrate them into your IT landscape.
Portfolio.int1Desc: Gain practical knowledge for designing integration strategies with ISA-M.
Portfolio.int2Desc: Learn how CI/CD pipelines improve automation in SAP Integration Suite.
Portfolio.int3Desc: Understand best practices for a successful migration to SAP Integration Suite.
Portfolio.ai1Desc: Understand large language model concepts and their application.
Portfolio.ai2Desc: Learn how to set up and run your own LLM locally.
Portfolio.ai3Desc: Hands-on learning – build your own AI prototypes

PeterAlexander.bodyEn: For a structured overview in English, please see the Curriculum Vitae (PDF) under Lectures. The sections below describe my SAP BTP, integration and AI experience in detail (German).

Imprint.networkTitle: Note on the “Next Chapter Experts” network
Imprint.networkBody: “Next Chapter Experts” is a network of independent experts. It is not a legal entity but a brand under which Peter Alexander offers his services as a freelance consultant.
Imprint.contentBody: This website’s content was prepared with care. However, no guarantee is given for accuracy, completeness or timeliness.
Imprint.linksBody: This site contains links to third-party websites over whose content I have no control; I cannot accept liability for that external content.
Imprint.copyrightBody: The content and works on these pages created by me are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any other use outside the limits of copyright law require my written consent. © 2024–2026 Peter Alexander / Next Chapter Experts. All rights reserved.
Imprint.disputeBody:
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

I am neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution before a consumer arbitration board.

Imprint.aiActTitle: Note on the use of AI systems (EU AI Act)
Imprint.aiActBody: Parts of the texts and content published on this website — in particular blog articles — may have been created, translated or further developed with the assistance of AI systems (large language models). All published content is editorially reviewed and approved. This notice is provided in accordance with the transparency obligations under Art. 50 of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (EU AI Act).
Imprint.privacyLinkBody: Information on the processing of personal data can be found in our Privacy Policy.

Privacy.heroLead: Data protection is a high priority for me as a freelance SAP consultant.
Privacy.controllerBody:
Peter Alexander
Freelance SAP consultant
Madonnenbergweg 17
69198 Schriesheim, Germany
E-mail: kontakt@nextchapterexperts.com
Privacy.purposeBody: Your personal data is processed solely to deliver my consulting services, for communication and in connection with the “Next Chapter Experts” expert network. Data is shared with third parties only where necessary to fulfil a contract or where you have given consent.
Privacy.legalBody: Processing is based on the GDPR, in particular Art. 6(1)(b) (contract performance) and Art. 6(1)(f) (legitimate interest in operating a functional website and communication).
Privacy.formBody: If you contact me via a form, the information you provide, including contact details, is stored to handle your request and any follow-up questions. I will not share this data without your consent.
Privacy.emailBody: If you contact me by e-mail, your details including contact data are stored to process your request and any follow-up. I will not share this data without your consent.
Privacy.logsBody: When you visit this website, information is automatically stored in server log files transmitted by your browser: IP address, date and time of the request, URL accessed, browser type and version, operating system. This data is collected by Vercel Inc. on their servers to ensure technical operation. It is not combined with other data sources. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest).
Privacy.processorBody: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, USA. Vercel processes technical access data (including IP addresses, timestamps, pages visited) as part of the hosting service in accordance with the Vercel Privacy Policy (vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy). A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR has been concluded with Vercel. Data transfers to the USA are based on EU Standard Contractual Clauses (Art. 46 GDPR).
Privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection to processing and data portability. Contact me at kontakt@nextchapterexperts.com.
Privacy.securityBody: I use technical and organisational measures to protect your data against loss, manipulation and unauthorised access.
Privacy.extLinksBody: This site may link to third-party sites whose content I do not control; the respective provider is responsible for that content.
Privacy.changesBody: I may update this privacy policy to reflect legal requirements or changes to my services.

About.pageLead: We are an experienced company offering innovative solutions for modern businesses.
